text:
Once upon a time, there was a small village nestled at the foot of a giant pine forest. People loved living there because the forest was full of gentle animals and colorful flowers. There was a wise old owl who lived high up in the oldest pine tree.

Each morning, the owl would wake up and sing a beautiful song about the wonders of nature. Sometimes she would whistle about a curious raccoon who loved to play peek-a-boo with the squirrels.

One day, there was a terrible storm so powerful that it shook the entire forest. The old pine tree groaned and bent double.

The villagers were scared. They thought the owl would fall out.

But the owl just hugged closer to her brother pinecone nest. She shook her head.

"You're just sleepy from the storm," she sang.
And that night, the storm stopped. When the villagers got up the next day, the forest was like it always was - bright and colorful.

The next morning, the owl greeted the villagers
